title: FAQ

items.question: Why contracts first?
items.answer: One contract source removes drift between Angular client types and backend handlers.

items.question: When should I run `contract-kit check`?
items.answer: Before release and in CI. It is the safety net against accidental breaking changes.

items.question: Can I use only validation without generation?
items.answer: Yes. Use `contract-kit validate` to run schema checks only.

items.question: Do generated files replace manual code?
items.answer: Generated files define typed boundaries. Business logic stays in your app code.

troubleshootingItems: Run `contract-kit validate` first to isolate schema issues quickly.
Regenerate artifacts after every contract change before debugging app code.
Use `contract-kit check --json` in CI and inspect the reported diff object.
If output is unexpected, attach contract file and command output in a GitHub issue.
